data.name: PaymentProcessed
data.value: Your payment has been processed correctly

data.name: StatusPaidDesc
data.value: Your payment has been processed successfully

data.name: StatusPreparingDesc
data.value: We are preparing your order for shipping

data.name: StatusOnWayDesc
data.value: Your order will be shipped soon

data.name: StepEmailDesc
data.value: You will receive an email with your order details and tracking code

data.name: StepSmsDesc
data.value: We will keep you informed about your order status via SMS

data.name: StepSupportDesc
data.value: Our team is available 24/7 for any questions

data.name: ShareWhatsappMsg
data.value: I just made a purchase at VelourEssence! Order #{0} for ₡{1}

data.name: ShareTwitterMsg
data.value: I just made a purchase at VelourEssence! 🛍️ #VelourEssence #Shopping
